verses.text: A divorced and remarried wife may not return to the first. Divorce. God limits its abuse.
A divorced and remarried wife may not return to the first. Divorce. God limits its abuse.
A divorced and remarried wife may not return to the first. Divorce. God limits its abuse.
A divorced and remarried wife may not return to the first. Divorce. God limits its abuse.
A new husband is free a year to cheer his wife. Mercy. Marriage is honoured.
Take not the millstone in pledge; it is his living. Compassion. Pledges must not ruin.
The manstealer shall die. Kidnapping. Freedom is sacred.
Heed the law of leprosy; remember Miriam. Leprosy. Obey the priests.
Heed the law of leprosy; remember Miriam. Leprosy. Obey the priests.
Restore the poor man's pledge by nightfall. Pledge. The poor are treated kindly.
Restore the poor man's pledge by nightfall. Pledge. The poor are treated kindly.
Restore the poor man's pledge by nightfall. Pledge. The poor are treated kindly.
Restore the poor man's pledge by nightfall. Pledge. The poor are treated kindly.
Pay the hired servant his wages the same day. Wages. Withholding is sin.
Pay the hired servant his wages the same day. Wages. Withholding is sin.
Each dies for his own sin, not another's. Personal. Guilt is not inherited.
Pervert not the stranger's judgment; remember your bondage. Justice. Mercy flows from memory.
Pervert not the stranger's judgment; remember your bondage. Justice. Mercy flows from memory.
Leave the gleanings for the poor and the stranger. Gleanings. The needy have a share.
Leave the gleanings for the poor and the stranger. Gleanings. The needy have a share.
Leave the gleanings for the poor and the stranger. Gleanings. The needy have a share.
